name: Bannari Amman Spinning Mills Ltd
summary: Bannari Amman Spinning Mills Ltd engages in textile business in India. It manufactures and markets cotton yarns; woven and knitted fabrics; home textiles; and knitted garments, as well as processes fabrics. The company is also involved in the retail of inner wear and active wear for men, women, and kids under the Bitz brand. In addition, it engages in the wind power generation activities. The company also exports its products. The company was incorporated in 1989 and is based in Coimbatore, India. As of November 19, 2020, Bannari Amman Spinning Mills Ltd operates as a subsidiary of Murugan Enterprise Private Limited.
